title: Winter Wonderland
description: This pack changes Minecraft to only have colder biomes for the most part.
body:
I made this to change Terralith to have only cold biomes, but I realised it works with any biome datapacks/mods! (Some mods don't works as well).  It essentially changes the temperature and placement of biomes so only cold ones are placed!

I also plan to also add/change some existing biomes.

All screenshots were taken with photon and terralith!
